channel.title: Journal of Group Theory
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Group Theory

item.title: Finite simple permutation groups acting with fixity 4
item.description: Article by Jason Semeraro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2023-0045

item.title: Flag-transitive 2-designs with prime-square or prime-cube block length
item.description: Article by Jason Semeraro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2023-0082

item.title: Monster embeddings of certain 3-transposition groups via Majorana representations
item.description: Article by Jason Semeraro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2023-0099

item.title: Finite groups with a small proportion of vanishing elements
item.description: Article by Jason Semeraro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2024-0016

item.title: On 𝜎-permutable subgroups of 𝜎-soluble finite groups
item.description: Article by Jason Semeraro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2024-0012

item.title: Semi-generalized Bassian groups
item.description: Article by Jason Semeraro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2023-0229

item.title: Absolute ideals of almost completely decomposable abelian groups
item.description: Article by Jason Semeraro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2023-0281

item.title: Orbit-blocking words and the average-case complexity of Whitehead’s problem in the free group of rank 2
item.description: Article by Jason Semeraro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2024-0140

item.title: Subgroups of even Artin groups of FC type
item.description: Article by Jason Semeraro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2023-0093

item.title: On decidability of the product of subgroups membership problem for nilpotent groups
item.description: Article by Jason Semeraro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2023-0119

item.title: On generalized concise words
item.description: Article by Jason Semeraro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2024-0148

item.title: Corrigendum to Centralizers of subsystems of fusion systems [J.~Group Theory 18 (2015), 393--405]
item.description: Article by Jason Semeraro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2024-0142
